power.confirm_kill: Are you sure you want to kill this server? This may cause data loss.

console.title: Console
console.server_stopped_message: Server is currently offline. Use the power controls above to start it.

websocket.pelican_throttled: Pelican is rate-limiting requests for this server. Wait a moment and retry.
websocket.pelican_denied: Pelican refused access to this server's console.
websocket.pelican_unavailable: Pelican is currently unreachable. The console will reconnect automatically.

eula.banner: This server hasn't accepted the Minecraft EULA, so it can't start.
eula.title: Accept the Minecraft EULA
eula.body: To run a Minecraft server you must accept Mojang's End User License Agreement (EULA). Do you accept it?
eula.error: Couldn't accept the EULA. Please try again.

java.banner: The server failed to start: its Java version is incompatible.
java.title: Incompatible Java version
java.body: This server's software needs a different Java version. Pick a Docker image below.
java.body_with_version: This server's software needs Java {{java}} or newer. Pick a Docker image below — we recommend the highlighted one.
java.empty: No Docker images are available for this server.
java.not_allowed: That image isn't allowed for this server.
java.error: Couldn't change the image. Please try again.
